content_body:
Nestled in the heart of the Blue Ridge Mountains, Old Union Golf Course offers a unique golfing experience.

Its valley layout, with a unique links-style design, caters to players of all skill levels, from beginners to seasoned professionals. 

Old Union boasts the premier practice facility in the North Georgia Mountains, featuring expansive turf tees, all-weather tees, sculpted target greens, practice putting and chipping areas, a practice bunker, and a dedicated short game section.

The welcoming staff is dedicated to ensuring every guest has a comfortable and enjoyable visit.

Conveniently situated between Blue Ridge, Murphy, and Blairsville, Old Union offers an affordable range of activities, from lessons and practice sessions to playing 9 or 18 holes.

After your game, unwind with refreshments on the porch while taking in the scenic surroundings.

Make golf a memorable part of your mountain getaway!
title: Old Union Golf Course
